# Cloak of the 1000 Oceans
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cloak%20of%20the%201000%20Oceans&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Cloak of the 1000 Oceans
| desc = This has literally the simplest name ever, I'm not good at those, okay? Good for chain-rushing.
| slot = cloak
| tier = UT
| rarity = h

| cost = 90
| cooldown = 1
| feedp = 1250
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| invisible = 3
| speedy = 3

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Thessal the Mermaid Goddess]]
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavCloaks}}
[[Category:Cloaks]]
</noinclude>
